reviews.review_text:
YAHOO Old managers gone after 30 years.New managers making a difference already
Park residences all happy but very sad they illed alk the ducks around pool.very illegel now new managers seem to hv turned nasty to elderly folf. Kicking people out  all over the park

A nice little caravan park on a hillside (so it can’t flood -lol!) close to great amenities at Runaway Bay sports centre and shopping centre. Catering mainly for longtermers with only a few ‘tourist’ sites available, it is clean, tidy, functional and in a great site geographically for the GC. And there’s a small shop next to the entrance. Oh, there’s no wifi, but has great custodians in Judy and David, and a few roaming gorgeous roos to boot. Love it!
Amazing, best staff ever 👌

Super accueil du personnel, nous sommes tombé en panne de batterie et le manager et sont équipe nous ont tout de suite aidé. Camping sympa et sanitaire très propre!
Je recommande👌
Pine Ridge village is a great holiday park and permanent  home village . Great managers.
Very noisey place . Plus workers will hit you up for money and alcohol. And the amount of rubbish stored behind place I wonder if Gold Coast council know about the rubbish
Great place
Old park with mainly permanent residents, Julie very helpful and accommodating, need to ring and discuss your requirements.
Lots of kangaroos around sunset

We spent a few weeks here and could not fault the park. All the the staff are very helpful and  friendly. Amenities are always clean. Bbq area with a swimming pool. Very safe, quiet and well maintained park at very reasonable rates with only a short drive to Surfers Paradise. The kangaroos hopping around are a nice touch to see on your site from time to time. Thank you all very much for a great stay. We would highly recommend this park to anyone. Look forward to staying with you again one day.
Love, love, love it

Probably the best customer service I've ever recieved, arrived way past closing time and a lovely lady picked up the phone and helped me out so much, so kind and helpful. Would recommend to everyone staying around here. The park is also very clean and beautiful
Booked in for twelve months.
Great safe place to live. New management are friendly. Lawns and grounds are immaculate. Highly recommended.
Bloody good burger 🍔

I asked at the office if I could drive a stroke victim into the village to visit a family member.
The response was get your family member to come & pick him up & drive him in, “I’m not running a valet service”.
The owner is very rude & has no compassion at all.  Not a place I ever want to visit again!

As a visitor, this park seems well kept, facilities are very clean, and the pool looks inviting.
There are kangaroos around the place, birds and other native wildlife which makes it feel like you're in the bush. It is quiet and tranquil with over 50's living, vans and portable homes are spread nicely around the grounds which is off a main road, close to train, major shops and many other facilities.
Wanted to book a site but took one look at the green slime filled pool and got the hell out!
I live here

I recommend this park for it's great location as being very close to main attractions and larger shopping plazas is quite and peaceful. Enjoyed our two months stay . Thank you Debbie and Tony, will come again.
Lovely place but needs maintenance and upgrading looking a bit old and shabby than that great place to stay
